author: implement-sqlalchemy-postgresql-tests
content: Plan: (1) Add psycopg2 and pytest-postgresql to environment.yaml conda-forge section in alphabetical order. (2) Modify test/storage/fixtures.py to import pytest_postgresql factories, create postgresql_proc and postgresql fixtures, add postgresql scenario to structured_scenarios, handle request.param==postgresql by constructing SQLAlchemyStorageProvider with postgresql+psycopg2:// URL. (3) Install deps. (4) Run tests.
